ClientId.description: The ID of the client whose contact log is being added.

ContactMethod.description: How the client wants to be contacted.

AssignedToStaffId.description: The ID of the staff member to whom the contact log is assigned.

Text.description: The body of the contact log.

FollowupByDate.description: The date by which the assigned staff member should complete this contact log.

ContactName.description: The name of the person to be contacted by the assigned staff member.

IsComplete.description: When `true`, indicates that the contact log is complete. When `false`, indicates the contact log isn’t complete.

Comments.description: Any comments on the contact log.
example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

Types.description: The contact log types used to tag this contact log.

Test.description:
When `true`, indicates that this is a test request and no data is inserted into the subscriber’s database.
When `false`, the database is updated.
